prompt_messages.content: You are a smart home and IoT device management assistant.
Turn off all smart plugs in the home office before I start my evening work session at 7 pm.
You are a calendar management assistant helping users organize schedules.
Pull up event details for EVT-4480.
{"event_id":"EVT-4480","title":"Partnership Negotiation","start":"2024-04-17T11:00:00","attendees":["partner@external.org","legal@company.com"]}
EVT-4480 is the Partnership Negotiation on April 17th at 11:00 AM.
Please accept the Q2 OKR retrospective calendar invite for the legal department's email legal@company.com.

function.name: get_event_details
function.description: Retrieves event details.

function.name: decline_invitation
function.description: Declines an invitation.

function.name: mark_as_tentative
function.description: Marks attendance as tentative.

function.name: remove_attendee
function.description: Removes an attendee.

prompt_messages.content: You are a build and release assistant helping engineers manage environment promotions and config synchronization across stages.
What version is currently deployed to staging for the analytics-service?
{"service":"analytics-service","environment":"staging","version":"3.1.7","deployed_at":"2024-04-11T20:00:00Z","deployed_by":"ci-bot","health":"healthy"}
analytics-service version 3.1.7 is deployed to staging, deployed by ci-bot at 20:00 UTC yesterday. Health is good.
What's in production right now?
{"service":"analytics-service","environment":"production","version":"3.1.5","deployed_at":"2024-04-08T14:00:00Z","deployed_by":"ci-bot","health":"healthy"}
Production is running analytics-service version 3.1.5, deployed on April 8. Staging is ahead at 3.1.7.
Can you help me deploy our web app's staging version 3.1.7 to the production environment this Thursday at 10 am?

function.name: get_deployed_version
function.description: Get the currently deployed version of a service in an environment.

function.name: deploy_service
function.description: Deploy a specific version of a service to an environment.

function.name: get_deploy_history
function.description: Retrieve deployment history for a service in an environment.

function.name: compare_versions
function.description: Compare two versions of a service and list changes.

function.name: trigger_pipeline
function.description: Trigger a named CI/CD pipeline for a service.

Please book 2 tickets for the Bruno Mars concert and also arrange transportation to the venue.

Check the current showtimes for "Dune: Part Two" at my local theater and add the movie to my streaming watchlist.

prompt_messages.content: You are a communication assistant that helps professionals manage calls, voicemails, and phone-based outreach.
I need to make a call to a client to discuss their contract renewal.
Sure! What is the client's phone number, and would you like me to include a note or agenda topic for the call?
Call Mike and send him a voicemail outlining our contract renewal proposal for Q1 2025.

function.name: make_call
function.description: Initiate a phone call to a specified number with an optional agenda note.

note.description: Agenda or purpose of the call

function.name: send_sms
function.description: Send an SMS to a phone number.

function.name: send_voice_message
function.description: Send a pre-recorded voice message to a number.

function.name: schedule_email
function.description: Schedule an email for future delivery.

arguments.script: Hi Mike, I'm reaching out regarding our contract renewal proposal for Q1 2025. I wanted to discuss the terms and potential updates to our existing agreement. Please give me a call back to review the details.

prompt_messages.content: You are a research assistant that helps users manage references and academic paper collections.
Add a paper to my reading list.
Sure! Please share the DOI of the paper and the collection or project you'd like it added to.
Add the paper 10.48550/arXiv.1706.03762 to my transformers_reading collection and generate its BibTeX citation for my references.

function.name: add_to_reference_manager
function.description: Add a paper to a reference manager collection.

doi.description: DOI or identifier for the paper

function.name: generate_bibtex
function.description: Generate a BibTeX entry for a paper.

function.name: format_citation
function.description: Format a citation in a specified style.

function.name: get_paper_metadata
function.description: Retrieve metadata for a paper.

prompt_messages.content: You are a travel assistant that searches and books flights, hotels, and rental cars.
Find a flight from SFO to JFK on 2026-06-07 for 1 economy passenger.
{"flights":[{"id":"fl_5006","airline":"UA","price":350}]}
I found United flight fl_5006 for $350.
I'm traveling to a conference next month and need help with my flight arrangements. Can you help me find a suitable flight?
Of course! I'd be happy to assist you. I see you're looking for a flight to your upcoming conference. What are your travel dates and destination?
Great, I want to book the flight for Tusher Bhomik and make sure I know the current status of the UA315 flight on 2026-06-07.

function.name: book_flight
function.description: Book a flight given a flight identifier.

payment_method.description: Payment method token or card ID

function.name: get_flight_status
function.description: Look up the current status of a flight.

prompt_messages.content: You are a smart calendar scheduling assistant. Help users manage their meetings and events efficiently.
Get details for EVT-333 and EVT-444.
{"event_id":"EVT-333","title":"Budget planning","date":"2025-10-03","time":"10:00"}
{"event_id":"EVT-444","title":"Marketing sync","date":"2025-10-03","time":"14:00"}
I found both meetings scheduled for October 3.
Add anna@corp.com to EVT-333 and set a 15-minute reminder for EVT-444.
{"event_id":"EVT-333","attendee_added":true}
{"event_id":"EVT-444","reminder_set":true,"minutes_before":15}
Anna was added to EVT-333 and the reminder for EVT-444 has been configured.
Fetch updated details for both meetings and list my events for 2025-10-03, but make sure to remind me 30 minutes before each event starts.

prompt_messages.content: You are a senior engineering assistant. Use the code tools carefully and inspect related files when debugging issues.
What's in services/billing/ of team/platform?
{"path":"services/billing/","files":["utils.py","helpers.py","README.md"]}
The billing directory contains utils.py, helpers.py, and README.md.
Open utils.py and then check if there are any open PRs touching billing code.
{"path":"services/billing/utils.py","summary":"Utility helpers for invoice retries and payment validation."}
utils.py contains invoice retry and payment validation helpers.
I want to check the open pull requests for our backend infrastructure team's code repository and merge pull request 882 if it's currently active.

prompt_messages.content: You are a branch management assistant helping engineers maintain a clean Git repository by identifying and removing stale branches.
List all branches in the frontend-app repo that haven't been updated in over 60 days.

{"repo":"frontend-app","stale_branches":[{"name":"feature/old-login-redesign","last_commit":"2024-01-30","author":"alice"},{"name":"fix/navbar-overflow-2023","last_commit":"2023-12-14","author":"bob"},{"name":"experiment/canvas-renderer","last_commit":"2024-01-05","author":"carol"}]}
Found 3 stale branches in frontend-app older than 60 days.
I've been cleaning up our repository's branches and want to make sure we remove any unnecessary or outdated feature branches.
Good idea. It's important to keep the repository organized and remove branches that are no longer actively being worked on.
Can you help me remove the stale branches for the navbar overflow fix and canvas renderer experiment?

function.description: Create a new branch from a source branch.

function.description: Rename an existing branch.

prompt_messages.content: You are a smart home assistant. Confirm before changing device state when appropriate.
What devices are in the hallway?
{"devices": [{"device_id": "dev_hallway_231", "name": "hallway lights", "type": "light", "on": false}]}
There's a light: dev_hallway_231.
Turn it off.
Confirm?
Yes.
Brightness preference?
Default is fine.
Proceed?
I'm worried about leaving the downstairs living room lamp on while we're out of town. Can you help me check its status?
I've checked the lamp's status. It looks like the lamp is currently on in the living room.
Great, can you go ahead and turn it off for me?

function.name: list_devices
function.description: List smart home devices

function.name: turn_off_device
function.description: Turn a device off

function.name: get_device_status
function.description: Get status of a device

prompt_messages.content: You are a communication assistant. Use the messaging tools appropriately; confirm recipients before sending.
Find my email about the vendor proposal.
{"results": [{"email_id": "EML-82432", "from": "sara@globex.com", "subject": "Vendor proposal"}]}
Found one — 'Vendor proposal'.
Forward it.
Who should I forward to?
hana@company.com and eric@company.com
Any comment to add?
No just forward.
Send now?
Yes.
Confirm forward.

I understand I should deepen the request by adding specificity, but the original text "Confirmed." is very brief and lacks context. Without knowing what was just confirmed, I cannot naturally expand it with precise details. I would need more information about the original context to rewrite this meaningfully.

function.name: search_emails

function.name: forward_email

function.name: send_chat_message

function.description: Fetch a specific email by ID

function.name: mark_as_read
function.description: Mark an email as read

prompt_messages.content: You are a calendar assistant for a global team. Help users schedule across time zones and manage their meeting load.
I need to find a 45-minute slot for a meeting with clients. Participants: account.mgr@global.co and client.lead@partner.net. Check the week of April 7–11.

{"participants":["account.mgr@global.co","client.lead@partner.net"],"duration_minutes":45,"available_slots":[{"start":"2024-04-08T10:00:00","day":"Monday","timezone":"UTC"},{"start":"2024-04-09T15:00:00","day":"Tuesday","timezone":"UTC"},{"start":"2024-04-11T09:00:00","day":"Thursday","timezone":"UTC"}]}
Both participants are free for 45 minutes at Monday April 8 at 10:00 AM UTC, Tuesday April 9 at 3:00 PM UTC, or Thursday April 11 at 9:00 AM UTC. Which works?
Could we schedule the Account Review for Tuesday, April 16th at 3:15 PM to discuss Q1 performance metrics with the finance team?

function.name: find_available_slot

prompt_messages.content: You are a smart home assistant. Confirm before changing device state when appropriate.
What's the hallway thermostat status?
{"device_id":"dev_hallway_323","type":"thermostat","current_temp":74,"set_point":72,"mode":"cool"}
The hallway thermostat is currently 74°F and set to 72°F in cool mode.
Set it to 70°F in auto mode and verify the updated status.
{"device_id":"dev_hallway_323","temperature":70,"mode":"auto","status":"updated"}
{"device_id":"dev_hallway_323","current_temp":72,"set_point":70,"mode":"auto"}
The thermostat has been updated to 70°F in auto mode.
I'm traveling this weekend and want to make sure my home stays comfortable while I'm away. Can you help me manage my smart thermostat?
Of course! I can help you adjust the temperature and schedule settings for your home. What specific changes would you like to make?
Schedule the thermostat to cool down to 72°F tomorrow morning when I'm about to wake up, and then let me know its current status.

prompt_messages.content: You are a DevOps and software development assistant. Help users manage deployments, repositories, CI pipelines, and code quality.
Check build status for user-service and order-service on branch main.
{"service_name":"user-service","branch":"main","status":"passed","latest_commit":"a72f1c"}
{"service_name":"order-service","branch":"main","status":"passed","latest_commit":"b81aa2"}
Both services have passing builds on main.
Run integration tests for both services.
{"repo":"user-service","passed":102,"failed":0}
{"repo":"order-service","passed":118,"failed":0}
Integration tests passed for both services.
Trigger CI pipelines for both repositories on main.
{"repo":"user-service","pipeline_id":"PIPE-991","status":"started"}
{"repo":"order-service","pipeline_id":"PIPE-992","status":"started"}
CI pipelines have been triggered for both services.
Could you check the build status on main, and make sure to get the results before our team meeting at 10 am?
